plans.name: Starter
plans.description: Perfect for small teams getting started. Includes basic API access and email support for up to 5 users.

plans.name: Growth
plans.description: Designed for growing teams. Includes webhook integrations, priority support, and scales to 25 users.

plans.name: Enterprise
plans.description: Full-featured plan for large organizations. Includes SSO, audit logs, SLA guarantee, and unlimited users.

faqs.question: Do you offer a free trial?
faqs.answer: Yes, all plans come with a 14-day free trial, no credit card required.

faqs.question: Can I upgrade or downgrade my plan?
faqs.answer: Yes, you can change your plan at any time. Upgrades take effect immediately, downgrades at the next billing cycle.

faqs.question: Is there an annual discount?
faqs.answer: Yes, annual billing gives you 2 months free (equivalent to ~17% off).

faqs.question: What payment methods do you accept?
faqs.answer: We accept all major credit cards, ACH transfers, and invoicing for Enterprise customers.

faqs.question: Does the Enterprise plan include SSO?
faqs.answer: Yes, the Enterprise plan includes SSO (Single Sign-On), audit logs, and a dedicated SLA.
